topic: Great Americans Medal event at the National Museum of American History
fact_summary: The Smithsonian scheduled a free, captioned, ASL-interpreted Great Americans Medal ceremony and webcast for Melinda French Gates on July 15, 2026, at the National Museum of American History in Washington, D.C.
present_connection: The event provides a modern American setting for discussing how public museums combine national traditions, philanthropy, gender equality, accessibility, and online participation.
adaptation_note: The schedule, venue, honoree, award rationale, streaming access, and accessibility services are sourced facts; lighting, staff actions, collection details, and visitor reactions are pedagogical reconstruction.

sources.title: LIVESTREAM: Great Americans Medal Presentation to Melinda French Gates
